report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides covering DeSci (Decentralized Science) and GambleFi (Onchain Betting), both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE with full SEO metadata and structured data.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: DeSci (Decentralized Science): 50+ active projects, $60M+ combined funding. Key protocols: VitaDAO ($13M cap, $4M+ deployed to aging research, backed by Pfizer Ventures), Bio Protocol ($104.7M cap, coordinates bioDAOs), ResearchHub ($28.2M cap, tokenized peer review), Molecule (IP-NFT infrastructure), OriginTrail ($248.8M cap, Knowledge Graph). Uses DAOs for funding, IP-NFTs for tokenized IP, decentralized open peer review.

GambleFi (Onchain Betting): Crypto casinos ~17% of all iGaming bets globally, $81B annual revenue. Key protocols: Azuro Protocol (42+ dApps, vAMM + LiquidityTree architecture), Overtime Markets (Optimism/Base), SX Bet, Purebet (aggregator), Bookmaker.xyz. Uses liquidity pools instead of centralized bookmakers with smart contract settlement and transparent house edge.
Both topics identified as genuine content gaps after exhaustive analysis of 587 existing pages across degen0x. Selected based on March 2026 trending narratives and search demand.

sections.title: Content Created
items: DeSci guide: ~3000 words, 11 min read, 8 content sections + 6 FAQs. Covers what DeSci is, funding DAOs, IP-NFTs, key projects with market data, comparison table vs traditional science funding, tokenomics models, risks, 2026 outlook.

GambleFi guide: ~3200 words, 12 min read, 9 content sections + 6 FAQs. Covers what GambleFi is, onchain betting mechanics, key protocols, Azuro architecture deep dive, comparison table vs traditional gambling, LP opportunity analysis, risks (regulatory/smart contract/problem gambling), 2026 outlook.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: DeSci: Title 'DeSci (Decentralized Science) Guide 2026: Blockchain Research Funding | degen0x', target keyword 'desci decentralized science guide 2026', 10 keywords, Article + FAQ JSON-LD, OG + Twitter Card, canonical URL, breadcrumbs

GambleFi: Title 'GambleFi Guide 2026: Onchain Betting & DeFi Gambling Explained | degen0x', target keyword 'gamblefi onchain betting guide 2026', 10 keywords, Article + FAQ JSON-LD, OG + Twitter Card, canonical URL, breadcrumbs
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts for next daily rollout

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript compilation: 0 new errors from pages (pre-existing @types/web conflicts only)
Page structure validation: DeSci = 8 sections + 6 FAQs, GambleFi = 9 sections + 6 FAQs
Both pages match Walrus guide template (Metadata, StructuredData, Breadcrumb, BackToTop, dark theme)
